name: Process Hollowing Detection
description: Detects process hollowing indicators where legitimate processes are hollowed and replaced with malicious code
query:
// Detect process hollowing via suspicious API calls
// Trigger on NtUnmapViewOfSection followed by memory writes
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(NtUnmapViewOfSection|ZwUnmapViewOfSection|SetThreadContext|NtResumeThread|Invoke-ProcessHollowing)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 30 seconds
